_comment: Source credibility registry. credibility is 0-1 and drives the Breadth pillar in scorer.py (ARCHITECTURE.md §6). Edit/add rows here — no code change needed elsewhere.

sources.name: Google Trends
sources.notes: Geo-specific quantitative search momentum, hard data

sources.name: Bachli Bergsport
sources.notes: Premium CH outdoor retailer, core assortment-gap check

sources.name: Transa
sources.notes: Premium CH outdoor retailer, core assortment-gap check

sources.name: Galaxus / Digitec
sources.notes: CH's largest marketplace, real CHF prices and ranks

sources.name: Zalando
sources.notes: DACH fashion/outdoor marketplace, listing + price data

sources.name: Gear Media / Newspaper
sources.notes: Editorial coverage (GearJunkie, RoadTrailRun, outdoor-magazin.de), moderate credibility

sources.name: Reddit
sources.notes: Community buzz, weakest signal, easiest to game
